constraints.description: Canonical root must match the normalized homepage root.
Organization.name must match the extracted entity name when Organization schema is present.
Breadcrumb root must resolve to the homepage canonical.
Multiple Organization schemas must not conflict on name.
Canonical URLs must not represent multiple competing entity roots.
Entity root must not be undefined when schema objects indicate an Organization or Person.
Schema.org vocabulary must be used for structural definition.
If Person schema is present, it must not contradict the owning organization identity.
Breadcrumb path hierarchy must be structurally consistent (no logical jumps or unauthorized root substitutions).
Canonical URL must not contain unnecessary query parameters, tracking tags, or trailing variants.
Top-level identity declaration (title root, canonical, organization.name) must not conflict across surfaces.
Schema-detected identity must not conflict with the hostname-level entity root.
